---
title: "Redirecting to English portfolio"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; URL=index-en.html">

<div style="display:flex;min-height:60vh;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:2rem;">
  <div>
    <h1>Redirecting to the English portfolio...</h1>
    <p>If your browser does not redirect automatically, <a href="index-en.html">click here to continue</a>.</p>
  </div>
</div>
